name: structure-viewer
description: Open and inspect molecular structure files in an interactive Mol* viewer.

interface.longDescription: Molecular Structure Viewer helps you open and inspect PDB, CIF, mmCIF, and MOL files directly in Codex. Explore an interactive Mol* view, focus ligands, change representations and coloring, select residues, and ask follow-up questions grounded in the current viewer state.
defaultPrompt: Open this molecular structure in the interactive viewer
Inspect this structure and help me interpret the current view
